title: The Bomb Plot Comes Into Focus
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the bomb plot comes into focus, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Bomb Plot Comes Into Focus. Vivi and the crew continue the desperate hunt for the shooter and the bomb as the countdown shrinks. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The palace square will be blown up any moment now!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka and the others have already been done in...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And my voice won't reach anybody!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: What, are you actually trying to say you're more seriously injured than me right now!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: For a man, you sure do complain a lot! Look, I've injured my leg! I can't stand up!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: A-and, ohh I've lost so much blood I'm feeling dizzy...

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: I ate a ton of meat!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: And I'm full of surprising blood!

summary: This part develops the bomb plot comes into focus and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
